input_dict.question: Bertrand Tavernier and Charles Giblyn, have which mutual occupations?
input_dict.source_summary: Bertrand Tavernier and Charles Giblyn were both film directors and actors. Charles Giblyn was an American film director and actor of the silent era.
input_dict.target_summary:

- From summary_1 (first hop): Bertrand Tavernier — occupations listed: director; screenwriter; actor; producer (born 25 April 1941).
- From second-hop retrieval (visible supporting sentence): "Charles Giblyn (September 6, 1871 – March 14, 1934) was an American film director and actor of the silent era."
These retained facts allow the final-answer agent to determine which occupations overlap between Tavernier and Giblyn.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Bertrand Tavernier and Charles Giblyn were both film directors and actors. Charles Giblyn was an American film director and actor of the silent era.
